{"society_power": 6.0, "state_power": 2.0, "society_change": 1.5, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "Constitutional Revolution (1906) and first Majles", "reasoning": "The ulama-bazaar-reformist coalition mobilized mass basts, won a constitution and parliament, and militarily deposed the shah to restore it\u2014a major leap in organized society power. Meanwhile fiscal insolvency, foreign loans, the Anglo-Russian partition, and delegitimized dynasty further hollowed out an already weak Qajar state, despite the brief 1908 coercive reassertion."}
